title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MADAAT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DARAGA, PROVINCE OF ALBAY.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3498 / 57 OG No. 8, 1376 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2829, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MADAAT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DARAGA, PROVINCE OF ALBAY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Madaat in the barrio of San Vicente Grande, Municipality of Daraga, Province of Albay is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Madaat.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
